[30;1m128 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m129 | [0m[35mConfig variables can be passed in an object to the `keystone.init` method, or can be set any time be[0m
[30;1m130 | [0m[35mcalled using `keystone.set(key, value)`. This allows for a more flexible order of execution (e.g. if[0m
[30;1m131 | [0m[35mroutes, you can set the routes after configuring your Lists, as in the example above).[0m
